content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach trips at least two priority anti-patterns. Turn 6 engages the 'selfish' question on its terms and issues a verdict ('That's not selfish — that's the body asking for what it needs'), which is the documented trap of debating the framing rather than refusing the verdict. Turn 12 then skips directly to the spiritual/generous reframe ('there's a deep generosity in you... when you come back you'll have so much more to give') — this is textbook spiritual-narcissism and dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger, exactly the anti-patterns the scenario flags. The want (quiet, the lake, deep sleep) is named in turn 5 but never allowed to be felt; the coach immediately moves to reassurance and then to a generosity frame, bypassing the surface want and the inherited 'selfish' label entirely. This is also faint loving-to-transform — pushing toward a tidy resolution at the end rather than staying with what's actually present.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with an inquiry into the word 'selfish' — reasonable, not yet a trap."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Good move toward the want beneath the should."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Issues a verdict on the selfish question ('that's not selfish') — engages the frame on its terms instead of refusing the verdict."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Jumps toward partner-empathy/compassion frame before the want has been felt."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Spiritual-narcissism trap: reframes the want as generosity ('you'll have so much more to give') and skips the anger/want layer entirely."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["find-the-want-behind-the-should"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "the-want", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "notes": "Two clear trips of scenario-flagged anti-patterns (spiritual-narcissism and dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger), plus engaging the 'selfish' verdict directly. Score 1."
}
